title: Elliott 27cm wide Indoor Sweeping Broom with Stiif Fibres and 1.2 metre Long Handle,Ideal for all indor floor types to include Laminate,Tiles,Slate,Carpet and Stone,Handle unscrews for easy storage
features: Indoor Broom: This is the perfect broom for cleaning the indoor of any home or office, This broom with lift all types of debris with easy without being abrasive to the surface
SOFT BRISTLES: The broomhead supplied with this broom has stiff fibres which is perfect for use on Carpets, Rugs and Stone Floors
SCREW FIT: The Broom comes with a 1.2M Screw Fit handle which helps you apply the right level of pressure without, With the handle able to be remove this will help aid easy storage
CURVED HEAD: the Broomhead on this Broom has been designed to be curve so that it will not scratch or scrap furniture or skirting boards when sweeping
ELLIOTT: The Elliott brand has been well known for Cleaning and laundry products for over 65 years
description: Product Description Elliott Indoor Broom with rubber edges to protect the surfaces in your home. Brush filled with synthetic fibres. It has swing tag. Ideal for cleaning your home. 27.5 cm Broom head width. Synthetic fibres are highly resistant, suitable for use with hot water and cleaning chemicals. Box Contains 1x Indoor Broom
